description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a rectangular footprint, featuring a low-pitched roof and a modest front porch area. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored siding, with several windows and a main entrance visible on the front facade. The property includes a small, well-maintained lawn and a paved walkway leading up to the entrance. The roof appears to be flat or slightly sloped, with minimal overhang. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with some grouped together and others spaced apart. The overall style is simple and functional, typical of suburban residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story, light-colored bungalow with a flat roof, modest porch, and asymmetrical window arrangement, set on a small lawn with a paved walkway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch area, and several windows facing the lawn.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlighting the flat roof, back wall, and the extension of the lawn area.
description_view_2: Rear-side view with a clear look at the back of the bungalow and the continuation of the walkway.
description_view_3: Angled front view showing both the entrance, porch, and a broader section of the lawn and walkway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced windows
